RSI.description: Relative Strength Index — a momentum oscillator that measures the speed and magnitude of price changes to identify overbought or oversold conditions on a scale of 0 to 100.

rsi_length.description: Number of periods used to calculate the RSI.

rsi_buy_threshold.description: RSI level below which the asset is considered oversold (triggers BUY signal).

rsi_sell_threshold.description: RSI level above which the asset is considered overbought (triggers SELL signal).

BollingerBandReEntry.description: Detects re-entry signals when price returns inside the Bollinger Bands from the outside, suggesting potential reversal or mean-reversion trade opportunities.

bb_length.description: Number of periods for the Bollinger Band moving average.

bb_std.description: Standard deviation multiplier for the bands.

operation_type.description: Signal type to return: 1 = BUY (re-entry from below), 2 = SELL (re-entry from above).

BollingerBandWidth.description: Evaluates volatility by measuring the width of the Bollinger Bands. Useful for detecting squeezes (low volatility) or expansions (high volatility).

bb_length.description: Number of periods for the Bollinger Band moving average.

bb_std.description: Standard deviation multiplier for the bands.

bb_variation_min.description: Minimum band width percentage required to trigger a signal.

bb_variation_max.description: Maximum band width percentage allowed to trigger a signal (optional).

operation_type.description: Signal type to return if the condition is met: 1 = BUY, 2 = SELL.

EMACross.description: Detects a crossover between a fast and slow EMA. Used to identify trend direction changes.

operation_type.description: Signal type: 1 = BUY when fast EMA crosses above slow, 2 = SELL when fast crosses below.

EMADistanceCap.description: Checks if the price is above or below an EMA, but only if the distance between them is within a maximum percentage cap.

ema_length.description: Number of periods for the EMA calculation.

distance_pct_cap.description: Maximum allowed distance (%) between price and EMA to trigger a signal.

operation_type.description: Signal type: 1 = BUY (price above EMA), 2 = SELL (price below EMA).

EMASlope.description: Measures trend intensity by calculating the percentage slope of an EMA over a lookback period. Useful for filtering only strong or weak trends.

ema_length.description: Number of periods for the EMA calculation.

lookback.description: Number of bars back to compare the EMA against for slope calculation.

min_slope_pct.description: Minimum absolute percentage change in the EMA required to trigger a signal.

min_raw_slope_pct.description: Minimum directional (signed) percentage change required. Positive enforces upward slope, negative enforces downward.

operation_type.description: Signal type to return if the slope threshold is met: 1 = BUY, 2 = SELL.

MACDCross.description: Detects a crossover between the MACD line and the Signal line. Used to identify momentum direction changes.

macd_fast.description: Number of periods for the fast EMA.

macd_slow.description: Number of periods for the slow EMA.

macd_signal.description: Number of periods for the signal line smoothing.

operation_type.description: Signal type: 1 = BUY when MACD crosses above signal, 2 = SELL when it crosses below.

MACDDivergence.description: Detects bullish or bearish divergence between price and the MACD line, indicating potential trend reversals.

macd_fast.description: Number of periods for the fast EMA.

macd_slow.description: Number of periods for the slow EMA.

macd_signal.description: Number of periods for the signal line smoothing.

lookback.description: Number of candles to look back for finding the previous peak or trough.

operation_type.description: Signal type: 1 = BUY for bullish divergence, 2 = SELL for bearish divergence.

StochasticRSILevel.description: Emits a signal when the Stochastic RSI K-line crosses a defined threshold level, combining RSI and Stochastic for more sensitive overbought/oversold detection.

rsi_length.description: Number of periods for the RSI calculation.

stoch_length.description: Number of periods for the Stochastic calculation.

threshold.description: The level to check against: below this for BUY, above for SELL.

operation_type.description: Signal type: 1 = BUY if K is below threshold, 2 = SELL if K is above threshold.

StochasticRSICross.description: Detects a crossover between Stochastic RSI %K and %D lines, optionally filtered by a threshold zone.

rsi_length.description: Number of periods for the RSI calculation.

stoch_length.description: Number of periods for the Stochastic calculation.

threshold.description: Optional zone filter: cross must occur below this level for BUY or above for SELL.

operation_type.description: Signal type: 1 = BUY when K crosses above D, 2 = SELL when K crosses below D.

ADXRange.description: Evaluates whether the ADX (Average Directional Index) trend strength falls within a specified range. Useful for filtering trades by trend strength.

adx_length.description: Number of periods for the ADX calculation.

adx_min.description: Minimum ADX value required to trigger a signal (optional).

adx_max.description: Maximum ADX value allowed to trigger a signal (optional).

operation_type.description: Signal type to return if the ADX is within the specified range: 1 = BUY, 2 = SELL.

DMPRange.description: Evaluates whether the Positive Directional Indicator (+DI) falls within a specific range. Used to measure and filter bullish directional pressure.

adx_length.description: Number of periods for the +DI calculation.

dmp_min.description: Minimum +DI value required to trigger a signal (optional).

dmp_max.description: Maximum +DI value allowed to trigger a signal (optional).

operation_type.description: Signal type to return if the +DI is within the specified range: 1 = BUY, 2 = SELL.

DMNRange.description: Evaluates whether the Negative Directional Indicator (-DI) falls within a specific range. Used to measure and filter bearish directional pressure.

adx_length.description: Number of periods for the -DI calculation.

dmn_min.description: Minimum -DI value required to trigger a signal (optional).

dmn_max.description: Maximum -DI value allowed to trigger a signal (optional).

operation_type.description: Signal type to return if the -DI is within the specified range: 1 = BUY, 2 = SELL.

ClosePrice.description: Checks if the current close price is within a specific percentage distance of a defined target price level. Useful for price target monitoring.

target_level.description: The target price value to check against (required).

tolerance_pct.description: Maximum allowed percentage distance between current price and the target level.

operation_type.description: Signal type to return if price is within range: 1 = BUY, 2 = SELL.

NGreenCandles.description: Returns a signal if the most recent N consecutive candles are all green (Close > Open).

n_candles_length.description: Number of consecutive green candles required (required).

n_candles_operation.description: Signal type to return if condition is met: 1 = BUY, 2 = SELL (required).

n_candles_offset.description: Offset to shift the lookback window back by N candles.

NRedCandles.description: Returns a signal if the most recent N consecutive candles are all red (Close < Open).

n_candles_length.description: Number of consecutive red candles required.

n_candles_operation.description: Signal type to return if condition is met: 1 = BUY, 2 = SELL.

n_candles_offset.description: Offset to shift the lookback window back by N candles.

AboveEMA.description: Checks if the current close price is strictly above a calculated EMA.

ema_length.description: Number of periods for the EMA calculation.

operation_type.description: Signal type to return if price is above the EMA: 1 = BUY, 2 = SELL.

BelowEMA.description: Checks if the current close price is strictly below a calculated EMA.

ema_length.description: Number of periods for the EMA calculation.

operation_type.description: Signal type to return if price is below the EMA: 1 = BUY, 2 = SELL.

NearEMA.description: Checks if the current close price is within a specific percentage distance of a calculated EMA.

ema_length.description: Number of periods for the EMA calculation.

tolerance_pct.description: Maximum allowed percentage distance between price and the EMA.

operation_type.description: Signal type to return if price is within range: 1 = BUY, 2 = SELL.

NearSupport.description: Identifies a dynamic support level (lowest low in the lookback window) and checks if current price is within a tolerance distance from it.

support_lookback.description: Number of candles to look back to find the support low.

tolerance_pct.description: Maximum allowed percentage distance between price and the support level.

operation_type.description: Signal type to return if price is near support: 1 = BUY, 2 = SELL.

NearResistance.description: Identifies a dynamic resistance level (highest high in the lookback window) and checks if current price is within a tolerance distance from it.

resistance_lookback.description: Number of candles to look back to find the resistance high.

tolerance_pct.description: Maximum allowed percentage distance between price and the resistance level.

operation_type.description: Signal type to return if price is near resistance: 1 = BUY, 2 = SELL.

PriceAboveBollingerBand.description: Checks if the current close price is above the Upper Bollinger Band, indicating a potential overextension or breakout.

bb_length.description: Number of periods for the Bollinger Band moving average.

bb_std.description: Standard deviation multiplier for the bands.

operation_type.description: Signal type to return if price is above the upper band: 1 = BUY, 2 = SELL.

PriceBelowBollingerBand.description: Checks if the current close price is below the Lower Bollinger Band, indicating a potential mean-reversion opportunity.

bb_length.description: Number of periods for the Bollinger Band moving average.

bb_std.description: Standard deviation multiplier for the bands.

operation_type.description: Signal type to return if price is below the lower band: 1 = BUY, 2 = SELL.

Doji.description: Detects a Doji candlestick pattern, where Open and Close are virtually equal, signifying indecision between buyers and sellers.

operation_type.description: Signal type to return when a Doji is detected: 1 = BUY, 2 = SELL.

Hammer.description: Detects a Hammer candlestick pattern — a bullish reversal pattern with a small body at the top and a long lower shadow. Only triggers on green candles (Close > Open).

InvertedHammer.description: Detects an Inverted Hammer candlestick pattern — a bullish reversal pattern with a small body at the bottom and a long upper shadow. Only triggers on green candles (Close > Open).

ShootingStar.description: Detects a Shooting Star candlestick pattern — a bearish reversal pattern with a long upper shadow and small body. Only triggers on red candles (Close < Open).

Engulfing.description: Detects a two-candle Engulfing pattern. Returns BUY for Bullish Engulfing (large green candle engulfs prior red) or SELL for Bearish Engulfing (large red candle engulfs prior green).

Harami.description: Detects a Harami candlestick pattern — a two-candle reversal where a small candle is contained within the body of the preceding large candle. Returns BUY (bullish) or SELL (bearish).

DragonflyDoji.description: Detects a Dragonfly Doji pattern — Open, High, and Close are at the same level with a long lower shadow. Signals a potential bullish reversal.

GravestoneDoji.description: Detects a Gravestone Doji pattern — Open, Low, and Close are at the same level with a long upper shadow. Signals a potential bearish reversal.

MorningStar.description: Detects a Morning Star pattern — a three-candle bullish reversal pattern: a red candle, followed by a small-bodied candle, followed by a green candle.

EveningStar.description: Detects an Evening Star pattern — a three-candle bearish reversal pattern: a green candle, followed by a small-bodied candle, followed by a red candle.

HangingMan.description: Detects a Hanging Man pattern — a bearish reversal pattern with a small body and long lower shadow appearing at the top of an uptrend. Only triggers on red candles (Close < Open).

BullishCandlePattern.description: Composite indicator that aggregates multiple bullish candlestick patterns (Engulfing, Harami, DragonflyDoji, Hammer, InvertedHammer, MorningStar). Returns BUY if any of the underlying patterns are detected.

BearishCandlePattern.description: Composite indicator that aggregates multiple bearish candlestick patterns (Engulfing, Harami, GravestoneDoji, ShootingStar, HangingMan, EveningStar). Returns SELL if any of the underlying patterns are detected.

VolumeBreakout.description: Checks if the current candle's volume exceeds the average volume of the previous N candles by a defined percentage threshold.

volume_lookback.description: Number of previous candles used to calculate the average volume.

increase_pct.description: Minimum percentage by which current volume must exceed the average (e.g., 50.0 means 50% above average).

operation_type.description: Signal type to return if the condition is met: 1 = BUY, 2 = SELL.

LongCandle.description: Checks if the total range of the current candle (High - Low) is larger than the average range of previous N candles by a defined multiplier.

lookback.description: Number of previous candles used to calculate the average total range.

multiplier.description: Multiplier applied to the average range. The current candle must exceed average * multiplier.

operation_type.description: Signal type to return if the condition is met: 1 = BUY, 2 = SELL.

CustomCandle.description: Evaluates a candle based on the percentage of its total range (High - Low) occupied by its upper and lower wicks. Allows fine-grained candle shape filtering.

upper_wick_min.description: Minimum percentage of the candle range that must be the upper wick (0–100).

upper_wick_max.description: Maximum percentage of the candle range allowed for the upper wick (0–100).

lower_wick_min.description: Minimum percentage of the candle range that must be the lower wick (0–100).

lower_wick_max.description: Maximum percentage of the candle range allowed for the lower wick (0–100).

operation_type.description: Signal type to return if all wick conditions are met: 1 = BUY, 2 = SELL.

LongBodyCandle.description: Checks if the body of the current candle (|Close - Open|) is larger than the average body of previous N candles by a defined multiplier.

lookback.description: Number of previous candles used to calculate the average candle body.

multiplier.description: Multiplier applied to the average body. The current body must exceed average * multiplier.

operation_type.description: Signal type to return if the condition is met: 1 = BUY, 2 = SELL.
